description: a(1) = 1, a(2) = 2; for n > 2, a(n) is the greatest unused number < a(n-1) such that it shares a factor with a(n-1) while rad(a(n)*a(n-1)) has not previously occurred as the rad value of the product of adjacent terms, where rad(k) = A007947(k). If no such number exists then a(n) is the smallest number > a(n-1) satisfying the same criteria.
